case_title: PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP vs. RAVEN, RANDY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP SERVED AUG-30-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERRELL, CHERYL ANN
PHOTOCOPY FOR PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RAVEN, RANDY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RAVEN, RANDY

JUDGE GEORGE CHOPPELAS JEFFREY MARGULIES FOR THE PLTF. RANDY RAVEN PRESENT & IN PRO PER 3:00 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD BY PLTF'S COUNSEL AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFTS RANDY RAVEN & CHERYL ANN FERRELL FOR $4,180 FOR RENTS OWED PAYA- AS FOLLOWS: BEG. 10/15/93, DEFT TO MAIL TO PLTF'S OFFICE $50/MONTH FOR OCT, NOVEMBER & DECEMBER,1993, THEREAFTER ON THE 15TH OF JAN. FEB & MARCH, 1994, DEFT TO MAIL $75 FOR EACH MONTH. ON THE 15TH OF APRIL, 1994, & EACH MONTH THEREAFTER, DEFT TO TENDER $100 UNTIL THE FULL AMT IS PAID. SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $936 WILL BE CREDITED. EACH PARTY TO RELEASE EACH OTHER FOR ANY CLAIMS. IF DEFT DEFAULTS IN THE PAYMENT, PLTF. MAY EXECUTE JUDGMENT. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. ALSO PUT ON THE RECORD THAT DEFT RANDY RAVEN HAS ALREADY VACATED THE PREMISES IN QUESTION ON 8/31/93 AND THAT THE OTHER 2 DEFTS HAVE ALSO VACATED THE PROPERTY.
